title: Atin Skirata
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]|the [[Atin Attan|pilot instructor]]}} {{Update|[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image=[[File:Atin.jpg]] |name=Atin Skirata
RC-3222 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |birth=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Kamino''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' states that the the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Omega Squad]] were ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the beginning of the Clone Wars in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and the creation of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|clone army]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], meaning that Omega [[Squad/Legends|Squad]], including Atin, must have been [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] in 32 BBY. |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Omega Squad]] *[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]]''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' **[[Clan Skirata]] |masters=[[Walon Vau]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Atin's ''very'' different. What happened to him to make him so burdened?|[[Etain Tur-Mukan]]|}} '''Atin''' (pronounced /aah-TEEN/), the [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] word for "persistent", or "stubborn", was the name taken by a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Omega Squad]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Designated '''RC-3222''', he was trained by [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Walon Vau]]. ==Biography== ===Training=== During his training, Atin gained several scars from battle. These were partly due to the regular training, but also for another reason: [[Walon Vau]]. Vau was a ruthless training sergeant, making his soldiers fight each other, or fight him. Vau made Atin choose after he lost his first squad, who were killed in training while trying to rescue him. Atin did not want to fight his brother clones, and instead opted to fight Vau. Vau nearly killed Atin with a [[Beskad/Legends|Mandalorian saber]]. Vau's training was brutal, and [[Kal Skirata]] saw him as a sadist. He joined a [[Unidentified clone commando squad (Atin)|second squad]] after being the sole survivor of his first squad. ===Loss of his squad=== In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Atin's fellow squadmates died at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], leaving him to be reassigned. To get Atin out of his survivor's guilt after his squadmates died, Vau took his knife to the clone, leaving a scar that stretched from his right eye to the left side of his chin, distinguishing him from his fellow [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]]. Atin soon after became part of the newly formed Omega Squad, along with three other clones who had lost the rest of their squads, [[Darman Skirata|Darman]], [[Fi Skirata|Fi]] and [[Niner Skirata|Niner]]. ===Mission to Qiilura=== Three months after the Battle of Geonosis, he accompanied Omega Squad on a [[Mission to Qiilura|mission]] to the world of [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]].He helped in the capture of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] scientist, [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Ovolot Qail Uthan]], and also in the defeat of the Separatist forces there, who were under the command of [[Ghez Hokan]]. During the mission, he was injured by [[Hurati]]. ===Galactic City Spaceport Hostage Siege=== A month later, Atin participated in the [[Galactic City spaceport hostage siege]] and helped to take out the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] terrorists.{{InsiderCite|81|Omega Squad: Targets}} ===Mission to Coruscant=== During a [[Mission to the Corellian-Perlemian Intersection|mission]] at the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian]]–[[Perlemian node|Perlemian]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] intersection, Atin and the rest of Omega Squad captured some terrorists connected to a terror cell on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' They were assigned with [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] and [[Kal Skirata]] to [[Mission to Coruscant (Clone Wars)|destroy the terrorist network]]. During the mission, Atin met up again with his former training sergeant, Walon Vau. [[Sev/Legends|Sev]], a member of Delta Squad who had also trained under Vau, tried to protect Vau from Atin and had uneasy feelings towards Atin at first, but Kal Skirata made them cooperate. After the mission was over, Atin got his chance to take out his feelings on Vau. He engaged Vau in nothing but a black bodysuit and with no weapons except a standard-issue commando [[Gauntlet vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]]. They fought until Atin was in a position to kill Vau, but before Atin could deal the killing blow, [[Bardan Jusik]] burst in, separated them both with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and ordered Atin to stand down. During the course of the Coruscant mission, Atin became romantically involved with a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] waitress named [[Laseema]]. ===Mission to Olanet=== About 65 days after the Coruscant mission, Atin accompanied the [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|Null-class ARC trooper]] [[Prudii Skirata|Prudii]] on a [[Sabotage of Olanet Droid Factory|mission]] to the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory on [[Olanet]].{{InsiderCite|87|Odds}} Atin had volunteered to do this, while the rest of Omega Squad were resting on Coruscant for a few days, so that he could learn Prudii's technique of infiltrating droid factories and making them produce substandard droids that could be defeated more easily. The mission was successful, but while they were there, Atin began to question the official [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] figures for the strength of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. They claimed that there were quadrillions of droids, but on Olanet, Atin could only see evidence for just a few hundred million. They were extracted from Olanet by a [[Traffic Interdiction Vessel|TIV]], which under Prudii's orders detoured and attacked a Separatist droid transport near to [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]]. This was an action that Atin thought was a bit crazy, because the droids were probably of a spiked batch, but Prudii explained that if they stopped taking shots at Separatists at whatever chance they had, then the Separatists may realize that the Republic had sabotaged their droids. Afterward they headed to an RV point near [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]], to meet up with Kal Skirata, who had recently returned from a [[Mission to Kamino (Clone Wars)|mission on Kamino]]. Atin was glad to see him again. ===Mission to Gaftikar=== A week later, Atin was sent with Omega Squad to the world of [[Gaftikar]], to aide the Null-class ARC trooper, [[A'den Skirata|A'den]] in training the local Gaftikari resistance forces.''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' They were transported there aboard the ''[[Core Conveyor]]'', along with the [[2nd Airborne Company/Legends|2nd Airborne Company]] of the [[212th Attack Battalion/Legends|212th Attack Battalion]]. The clones of the Airborne Company showed a dislike to Omega Squad, because of their Mandalorian heritage. Atin asked them why they had a problem with this and found out that the Airborne Company had fought against the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]], resulting in many casualties. Atin found this whole incident disconcerting, as it was the first case he found of clone troopers disliking other clone troopers, despite the fact that he was already aware of the heated rivalry between the Nulls and the Alpha-class [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC troopers]]. Afterward, he tried to take his mind off the incident, by reading a letter that Laseema had sent him. Atin and the rest of Omega Squad were dropped onto Gaftikar from the air, wearing [[Clone paratrooper/Legends|Clone paratrooper]] wings that they had fitted onto their armor and they were soon found by A'den, who showed them the location of the rebel's camp. The job of training the local [[Marit]] resistance fighters had originally fallen to [[Sull]], but he had gone MIA. The Marits got on well with all the clones, including Atin. When they offered him some of their stew, A'den told him ''"not to ask"'' about it and he happily tucked in. However, he then learned that the Marits had a custom of eating their dead and that the stew contained the grandmother of one of the lizards, something that prompted Atin to throw up. Fi made a number of jokes about this. Afterward, he accompanied Darman on a reconnaissance mission into Gaftikar's capital city, [[Eyat]], where they spotted Sull. They followed him back to his apartment and when they confronted him, things turned violent and Sull fired on them and hit Atin in the groin with his knee, but Atin succeeded in getting a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] to the ARC's throat. They took him back to the camp, where they handed him over to A'den. Sull was convinced that the Republic wanted to kill him, something that was confirmed when two [[Covert Ops clone trooper]]s attacked Darman, in the mistaken belief that he was Sull. Darman killed the troopers and Atin dug a grave for them, to give them a Mandalorian-style funeral. A few days later, he participated in the [[Battle of Gaftikar]] along with the rest of Omega Squad, who were ordered to identify comm stations on the planet, to target them for [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|V-19 Torrent starfighters]] to destroy. Afterward, they went to take out the Gaftikar [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] relay center. Atin climbed onto the roof to disable the satellite relay up-link, but the building suddenly exploded, causing him to break his ankle. Fi didn't come out so well and went into a coma, so Atin stood watch by his [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]] aboard the ''[[Leveler]]'', because he had bad memories from being in bacta, so he wanted to be there to comfort Fi in case he came around. ==Personality and traits== Atin was recognizable for his large scar on his face, which was still healing during Omega's Mission to Qiilura. He was moderately humorous, but mostly his humor consisted of replying to Fi's jokes. He would go dead serious in combat however, much like all Clone Commandos. Serving as the team's computer and technology expert, Atin was well-versed in communication and technology, as well as a small amount of demolitions, though most of such operations were left to Darman, Omega Squad's expert on that subject.{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=239051&start=15#13161930|thread=Ask Karen...(Karen Traviss approved)|user=[[Karen Traviss]]|date=2005-10-29|time=1:04 AM}} Atin discovered the Katarn Armor's weakness to Verpine Shatter Guns the hard way, and wound up in a fair amount of pain from it, although it did not seriously injure him. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}} *{{InsiderCite|81|Omega Squad: Targets}} *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' *{{InsiderCite|87|Odds}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Sources== *{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection|pack=Republic Elite Forces – Mandalorians and Omega Squad|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/tacREFomega.asp}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWMW|Omega Squad Communications}} {{Interlang |de=Atin Skirata |es=RC-3222 |pl=Atin Skirata |deGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Skirata, Atin}} [[Category:Clan Skirata]] [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Galactic Republic deserters]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Slicers]]
